title: Spear of Destiny
wikitext:
[]: Spear of Destiny Post by zephyr72 » Mon Jan 22, 2007 6:50 pm What are the origins of the spear of destiny in the context of Evangelion. Is it a product of science or was it found with the dead sea scrolls or what. I know that the spear of destiny was, historically, the lance that pierced Jesus.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 22, 2007 7:47 pm There is no "Spear of Destiny" of NGE. There is, however, a Spear of Longinus that has virtually nothing in common with the thing it's named after... </nitpick>

[]: Post by zephyr72 » Mon Jan 22, 2007 7:58 pm According to legend, the Holy Lance (also known as the Spear of Destiny, Holy Spear, Lance of Longinus , or Spear of Longinus) is the lance that pierced Jesus while he was on the cross. The Biblical account itself does not give a name to the spear, nor does it otherwise support the legends surrounding this artifact. - From a google search anyway, is there anything on the origin of the thing in the show?

[]: Post by Master » Mon Jan 22, 2007 8:38 pm zephyr72 wrote: According to legend, the Holy Lance (also known as the Spear of Destiny, Holy Spear, Lance of Longinus , or Spear of Longinus) is the lance that pierced Jesus while he was on the cross. The Biblical account itself does not give a name to the spear, nor does it otherwise support the legends surrounding this artifact. - From a google search anyway, is there anything on the origin of the thing in the show?

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 22, 2007 8:42 pm zephyr72 wrote: According to legend, the Holy Lance (also known as the Spear of Destiny, Holy Spear, Lance of Longinus , or Spear of Longinus) is the lance that pierced Jesus while he was on the cross. The Biblical account itself does not give a name to the spear, nor does it otherwise support the legends surrounding this artifact. - From a google search

[]: Post by Master » Mon Jan 22, 2007 8:54 pm I swear that I heard a refrence to it being the spear that peirced crist side in the show, or I was high. Which was probilty the case.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 22, 2007 8:57 pm Master wrote: I swear that I heard a refrence to it being the spear that peirced crist side in the show, or I was high. Which was probilty the case.

[]: Post by zephyr72 » Mon Jan 22, 2007 8:59 pm i could have sworn i saw "spear of destiny" as one of the subtitles while watching the show. edit: not that it matters, i was just asking if there is an origin to the lance in the show.

[]: Post by Master » Mon Jan 22, 2007 9:01 pm See I am not alone. It had to be between episods 1-23 to narrow it down more would ruin the fun and cause me to think.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 22, 2007 9:04 pm Dude WTF? Where did you get your sub and HAVE YOU BEEN PAYING ATTENTION TO THIS FORUM AT ALL? Here I'll help you just because. http://www.evaotaku.com/html/evafaq.html wrote: at the Otakon anime convention held in 2001, assistant director Kazuya Tsurumaki (who was the director of The End of Evangelion: Episode 25' Air - while Anno personally undetook The End of Evangelion: Episode 26' Sincerely Yours and acted as Chief Director) was asked directly what relvance Christianity had to Evangelion. This was his reply: Tsurumaki: There are a lot of giant robot shows in Japan, and we did want our story to have a religious theme to help distinguish us. Because Christianity is an uncommon religion in Japan we thought it would be mysterious. None of the staff who worked on Eva are Christians. There is no actual Christian meaning to the show , we just thought the visual symbols of Christianity look cool. If we had known the show would get distributed in the US and Europe we might have rethought that choice.

[]: Post by zephyr72 » Mon Jan 22, 2007 9:16 pm i know that the damn show isn't a Christian show; i just didn't know where the lance in the show came from. Yes, i have been paying attention to the forum and i received my answers already. I just was trying to clear up whatever misunderstandings my statements may have caused. In the meantime, you don't have to be a dick about the whole thing.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 22, 2007 9:22 pm All of this has been posted I don't know how many times. I know you've been around and should have seen it all. Forums have a search functions to look things up. Try that next time instead of rehashing something as constant rehashes get really annoying. All I can tell you is sarcasm used by others has rubbed off on me and this is the after effect, don't take it entirely serious.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 22, 2007 9:24 pm I think this thread has served its purpose.
